summary: Wire the desktop MCP server end-to-end through an off-by-default Settings toggle, Tauri stdin/stdout bridge, typed event port, validated frontend controller, and bounded pending-review queue.

decisions.decision: Use the desktop application's existing stdin/stdout only while the Settings toggle is enabled; Tauri forwards newline-terminated request frames to the frontend and writes one bounded response frame back to stdout.
decisions.rationale: This implements the specified stdio transport without opening a network socket or claiming browser MCP capability. The bridge starts disabled and validates the one-frame response boundary.

decisions.decision: Keep the initial enablement toggle session-local and default-off while the existing strict persisted-settings v1 schema remains unchanged; the application forces the native bridge off on hook cleanup.
decisions.rationale: The specification requires a Settings toggle and default-off behavior, but does not require persistence of that toggle. Avoiding an unversioned settings-schema change preserves strict import/export compatibility.

testEvidence.criterion: Desktop MCP remains off by default, enables through Settings, forwards typed Tauri requests, and routes valid response frames through the existing controller.
testEvidence.test: Run focused hook, Tauri-port, desktop-platform, SettingsDialog, and Workbench tests; run lint/build; run native MCP and full desktop Rust tests; then one aggregate browser/unit suite.

red.outcome: RED: the first inlined Workbench orchestration exceeded the repository's 400-line UI source policy limit (425 lines); native MCP compilation still passed.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/mcp/use-mcp-stdio.test.tsx tests/platform-desktop/tauri-mcp-port.test.ts tests/platform-desktop/desktop-platform.test.ts tests/ui/settings/SettingsDialog.test.tsx tests/ui/Workbench.test.tsx --reporter=dot; pnpm.cmd lint; pnpm.cmd build; cargo fmt --manifest-path src/desktop-shell/src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check; cargo test --manifest-path src/desktop-shell/src-tauri/Cargo.toml; pnpm.cmd test -- --reporter=dot
green.outcome: GREEN: focused coverage passed 5 files and 49 tests; lint/source policy and TypeScript/Vite build passed (244 modules); cargo fmt check passed; full desktop Rust suite passed 42 tests; aggregate passed 174 files and 1271 tests in 21.11 seconds.

nearMisses.sought: A newline-delimited request frame compatible with the frontend stdio decoder
nearMisses.confirmation: Rust BufRead::lines strips newlines, so the bridge explicitly re-terminates each emitted request frame before the aggregate run.

questions: The Settings toggle is intentionally session-local. Pending-review presentation and approval-to-runtime-dispatch, direct screenshot tool implementation, real desktop subprocess walkthrough, and hosted AC-11.b/c evidence remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
